functions.name: addKurrentDB
functions.description: Adds a KurrentDB resource to the application model. A container is used for local development. The default image is and the tag is .

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port on which the KurrentDB endpoint will be exposed.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string for the KurrentDB server.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the KurrentDB server.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the KurrentDB server.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a KurrentDB container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a KurrentDB container resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

handleTypes.name: KurrentDBResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a KurrentDB container.

capabilities.name: connectionStringExpression
capabilities.description: Gets the connection string for the KurrentDB server.

capabilities.name: host
capabilities.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

capabilities.name: port
capabilities.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

capabilities.name: primaryEndpoint
capabilities.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the KurrentDB server.

capabilities.name: uriExpression
capabilities.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the KurrentDB server.

capabilities.name: withDataBindMount
capabilities.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a KurrentDB container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

capabilities.name: withDataVolume
capabilities.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a KurrentDB container resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.
